TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Timur, title = Timur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Timur} }

S.FORM: Timur Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Timur a niyaro', 498 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,728 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,640 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 88 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan80%, Rukai9%, Tayal1%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: timo~u~ur itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u timo~u~ur a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai*%, tajaɾ*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Timur Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Timur a niyaro', 498 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,728 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,640 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 88 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan80%, Rukai9%, Tayal1%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: timo~u~ur itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u timo~u~ur a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai*%, tajaɾ*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
